summary: Full e2e testing of Rudralife complete redesign. Fixed critical form submission bug (frontend calling /api/submissions 404, backend only had /api/form/submit). Added new /api/submissions endpoint to backend with new schema. All landing page sections and full 6-step form flow + success screen working.

critical.issue: Endpoint did not exist - frontend calling /api/submissions but backend only had /api/form/submit with different field schema. FIXED: Added /api/submissions endpoint with new schema (fullName, phoneNumber, email, dateOfBirth, gender, city, state, country, goals, story)

integration_issues.issue: Close button (X) in video modal is blocked by the YouTube iframe overlay - clicking close fails with timeout. User cannot close modal via close button. Pressing Escape may work.

issues: Form page uses dark Rudraksha image as page background (dark theme). The form card itself has ivory theme but the overall page background is dark. Review request says 'light/ivory theme' for the form.

action_items: Video modal close button cannot be clicked - the fixed modal div intercepts pointer events. Fix: Move close button outside the YouTube iframe container or use pointer-events CSS fix
Form page background is dark (Rudraksha image) - if light/ivory theme is required for the whole form page, update page background
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py: Old /api/form/submit endpoint still exists with complex required fields (profession, career_stage, budget, wearing_preference, privacy_agreed) which are not collected in the new 7-step form - should be reviewed or removed to avoid confusion
The new /api/submissions endpoint was added at line ~182 in server.py - both endpoints now coexist
seed_data_creation: Test submission created with name 'Test User', email test@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 - Full form submission working after adding /api/submissions backend endpoint. All 6 form steps + success screen (step 7) working. Landing page all sections visible and correct. Minor issue: video modal close button blocked by overlay. Form page has dark background.
rca_of_issue: Root cause: Frontend RecommendationForm.js was calling /api/submissions (POST) per the design spec, but the backend server.py only had /api/form/submit with a different field schema (name/phone/dob vs fullName/phoneNumber/dateOfBirth). Fix: Added new SimpleSubmissionCreate model and /api/submissions endpoint in server.py to match the frontend payload.
